server.name: rental-ai-native-mcp
server.description: Native Model Context Protocol server for the aTx Finance Rental AI (white-label). Provides options-aware, tenant-isolated financial reasoning powered by Grok.

authentication.description: Standard Rental AI API key. Keys are minted per tenant via the admin API and carry scopes (chat, strategy, analyze).

rate_limits.note: Per-tenant daily token budget (default 200,000 tokens / UTC day). Concurrency limits may apply. Metering headers (x-rental-tokens-*) are returned on every successful response.

tools.name: rental_ai_chat
tools.description: Send a natural language question to the tenant-scoped Rental AI advisor. Returns markdown analysis with options-aware context and the tenant strategyBias injected. Supports streaming. IMPORTANT: outputs are educational only and NOT personalized financial advice.

portfolioId.description: Optional 24-hex Mongo portfolio id to scope context

stream.description: If true, the backend uses SSE for generation (recommended)

tools.name: rental_ai_create_strategy
tools.description: Start an async options strategy materialization job for the given symbols. Returns a jobId immediately. Poll with rental_ai_get_strategy.

notes.description: Free-text bias or constraints (e.g. "conservative income only")

portfolioId.description: Optional owned portfolio to enrich context

tools.name: rental_ai_get_strategy
tools.description: Poll a previously created strategy job. Returns status + result when completed.

tools.name: rental_ai_create_analyze
tools.description: Kick off (or continue) a deep portfolio/position analysis. Returns jobId.

tools.name: rental_ai_get_analyze
tools.description: Poll an analyze job. Returns status + narrative or structured result.

arguments.message: Run a conservative wheel income analysis on my NVDA and SPY positions using the rental advisor.
